title: teams — published macros
description: Two request-level macros that surface the resolved active team from the RequestContext (set by team.resolve_active middleware). Registered by TeamsServiceProvider::boot(). No Blueprint macros — the team-owned tables use standard column shapes.
namespace_note: Macros extend Illuminate\Http\Request. Middleware-set context bleeds through the Request accessor without needing to plumb it through service constructors.

macros.name: Request::activeTeam
macros.adds: A single accessor on the framework Request class that returns the resolved Team model (or null when no team context).
macros.description: Reads from RequestContext::team() set by the team.resolve_active middleware. Lazy-loads the model on first access — subsequent calls in the same request return the cached instance.

macros.name: Request::activeTeamId
macros.adds: Convenience accessor returning just the ID.
macros.description: Returns the id string without triggering the model load. Useful for creators that just need the FK.

no_blueprint_macros.reason: The teams module's owned tables (teams, team_members, team_trials, event_teams) use standard column shapes — no repeated JSONB blobs or shared column families that would justify a Blueprint macro.
